from source import pascal

def test_pascal_row_lengths():
    # Test that pascal(3) returns rows with lengths [1, 2, 3]
    result = pascal(3)
    assert len(result) == 3, "Should have 3 rows"
    assert len(result[0]) == 1, "First row should have length 1"
    assert len(result[1]) == 2, "Second row should have length 2"
    assert len(result[2]) == 3, "Third row should have length 3"
